title: What the heck So many questions
display_title: What the heck So many questions
wikitext:
[]: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by Wayne » Sat Jun 04, 2005 8:20 pm Alright I just finished watching Death & Rebirth + End of Evangelion and now I have like a bajillion questions. I can't think of all of them right now, but here is a couple: I don't understand what is the difference between Rei going into Adam (on Gendo's hand) and Rei going into Lilith. When Rei doesn't wanna fuse with Gendo, Gendo gets all pissed off but how does Rei fusing with Adam let Gendo see Yui again? How did Asuka's mom's soul get into Eva-02? I thought she hung herself... Why are those Pallet Guns so effective? I mean they are the same as the convetional weapons used by the UN but yet the Pallet Gun can kill some angels... Okay, finally, I would like to say that the English version of Evangelion wasn't that bad as some subtitle-fans say (I watched the show subbed and the movies dubbed). However, I would like to say that some voices jsut didn't fit. First of all, that nerdy NERV guy with glasses and has a crush on Misato - he is voiced by some black dude talking ghetto werd. Second, Rei's voice was a bit too deep. Finally, Asuka is like a bazillion times more annoying. And I have like 50 more questions to ask. If you want to step up to the challenge we can talk on AIM if you gimme your AIM and I'll ask you so many questions about Eva your head will explode.

[]: Re: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 04, 2005 8:32 pm Wayne wrote: I don't understand what is the difference between Rei going into Adam (on Gendo's hand) and Rei going into Lilith. When Rei doesn't wanna fuse with Gendo, Gendo gets all pissed off but how does Rei fusing with Adam let Gendo see Yui again?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jun 04, 2005 8:43 pm Greeting newcomer three things to keep in mind. 1.) SLow down and rewatch the show looking for the small stuff. 2.) ASk questions like your doing now. Just slow down a bit please one question at a time. 3.) Remember this word and what it means cuz you see it a lot in EVA fan circles. Apophenia - making connections where none previously existed. Have fun and learn from this show. Move on when your done, theirs other great stuff out their.

[]:             Quote Post by Wayne » Sat Jun 04, 2005 8:55 pm Sorry man, this is like my first anime that I really watched because I used to not like anime at all because it seemed all fake (the stuff on Cartoon Network). I just have so many questions because the dialogue is so pithy and sometimes hard to follow. Thanks for the answers Reichu + the advice from DatDude.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jun 04, 2005 9:06 pm NP Wayne welcome to the monkey house, we are glad to have you.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jun 06, 2005 11:55 pm Move ahead only if you desire the change. Otherwise, save yourself from this.

[]: Re: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jun 07, 2005 8:15 am Wayne, I sincerely hope that you've also watched the series itself. Watching Death first can be terribly, terribly confusing. Reichu wrote: Gendo doesn't get pissed off. He goes into a very uncharacteristic panic -- it's the only time in the show we see him so utterly helpless.

[]: Re: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by pav » Tue Jun 07, 2005 11:24 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Just on this, why is it that his soul was in his head especially. I'm sure they also included whatever scrapings they gleaned from Unit-01's hand before powerhosing it.

[]: Re: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jun 07, 2005 2:05 pm pav wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Just on this, why is it that his soul was in his head especially. I'm sure they also included whatever scrapings they gleaned from Unit-01's hand before powerhosing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 07, 2005 2:41 pm Because in NGE, your soul stays in your body when you die. If you failed to pick up on this, watch EoE again. And maybe episode #23, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jun 07, 2005 3:07 pm Reichu wrote: Because in NGE, your soul stays in your body when you die. If you failed to pick up on this, watch EoE again. And maybe episode #23, too.

[]: Re: What the heck! So many questions...             Quote Post by Sventevith » Tue Jun 07, 2005 5:33 pm Reichu wrote: Yeah, AFTER the contact experiment with the Eva in which her soul was sucked out. How her body managed to survive afterwards ... is a mystery, and a matter of discussion many, many threads.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jun 07, 2005 6:36 pm Correction, they kill ONE Angel. Generally speaking, they tend to be quite useless.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Jun 07, 2005 6:55 pm Welcome Wayne Glad we could help. Evangelions story line is supposed o be hard to follow becasue it is supposed to make you think. I managed to find out everything ( 90% of it anyway) for myself through just thinking and paying attention. And trust us when we say "our Heads wont explode". As for Asuka mother. It is up to debate. Asuka mother was like Yui in that she test piloted an evangelion. The difference is that asukas mother made it out with probably 10% or less of brain function ( probably include normal motor skills eg walking , talking etc) but she had no other ablities eg recogniseing people she knew. This is evident when she start calling a doll Asuka. "look at that girl over there" But Asuka mother was truely in Eva 02, the other 90% which had memory of past events , etc. Asuka is seriously messed up becasue of this ( her mother killing her self and her mother calling the doll Asuka , as well as her finding out what she wanted to do with Asuka nd herself ( hang themself)) . I think that se blames not only herself but also her Dad. Hence why she is so henistant to trust men , the exception being her olderman crush Kaji. As for comptitiveness it is a bit of natural competition and a bit of her messed up mind. Asuka effectively has a emotional wall around her to protect her from getting hurt again. When Rei tells Asuka to let the eva into her mind ( Mind my expression here , I havent watch eva for a while :P ), she snaps at Rei when the elevator has almost stopped and she is getting out. Hence in that sense both Asuka and Shinji are the same they dont want people to get to close to them. Plus Shinji has the problem that he doesnt want to be around himself. Lets see Gehirn ( which is later turned into nerv , Gehirn meaning brain ( German)) took the lives of Yui Ikari - Eva 01 test subject and 1 st and 3rd in comand at Gerhin( if I remember right and also a former member of Seele Naoko Akagi - Built the magi and top scientist at Gerhin Asuka mother - Eva 02 test subject and her husband was in charge of one of the bases in europe ( either at that time or later , I can not rember) Misatos father - top scientist Notice the pattern, nearly all are females and they all are important to Gerhin. The ironic thing is that all three ( except mistao's father) souls are in the eva's ( well Naoko Akagi one is debateable ( but might explain why eva unit 00 goes rogue all the time)). An yet their children work for nerv Asuka Langley Soryu Misato Katsuragi Ritsuko Akagi Shinji Ikari This is however hide from them ( except Ritsuko) and Misato knows about her father but not about the other stuff. I could go on and on , but I dont have the time.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jun 07, 2005 7:35 pm Actualy as far as I know their is no proof in the series that Yui was a member of Seele, only that they funed her research in college. Theyrs other information that doesn't comke from the show its self a lot of peole bas theorys on. My advice is to watch the series and the movies and base your gusses of of them alone. Please guys lets not confuse this n00b. If you mention stuff thats not from the show it self Please say so.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jun 07, 2005 7:51 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: Lets see Gehirn ( which is later turned into nerv , Gehirn meaning brain ( German)) took the lives of Yui Ikari - Eva 01 test subject and 1 st and 3rd in comand at Gerhin( if I remember right and also a former member of Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by Wayne » Wed Jun 08, 2005 12:06 am Hey guys, thanks A LOT for the explanations. I really appreciate it. Right now, I have far less questions jumping around in my head after I read a few FAQs and forum topics. Sorry, but just a few burning questions that I can't seem to figure out: 1. In the last part of EoE, did Shinji kill the Rei/Lilith glowing being to stop the Third Impact or what? If he did stop it, why did everyone except Asuka still turn into LCL? 2. Who is that old lady who talks to Kaji in one of the episodes? 3. I know that when Rei merges with Lilith, she will start the Third Impact. But what if Rei merged with Adam? Same result? What if an Angel merges with Lilith? 4. What really is the use of the Lance of Longinus? And if those fake lances (on the MP Evas) don't work, why are they used in initiating the Third Impact? 5. Finally, how do astronomers have photographs of the Milky Way galaxy if we are located in the galaxy? To give an analogy, this is like taking a picture of your house while you are in your living room -- doesn't work. Then, how come some textbooks have pictures of the entire Milky Way as if they were in some distant galaxy and looking at us? Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Jun 08, 2005 1:36 am As far as I can remeber, there was a disccusion between Yui and Fuyutsuki with Shinji as a little child along side a lake with a tree on the right. I think it was in the directors cuts. I pretty sure that she said or hinted that she was on seele. I will check, I maybe wrong but I am sure that she did say it. I will only beable to get back to you guys on this in about 18 hours or so from this post. Go to eat , sleep and do uni work.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 08, 2005 2:09 am Soluzar wrote: There's strong - pretty much undeniable - evidence that she was working for SEELE, but the term "member" seems to indicate to me a person who is a part of the inner circle, which Yui does not seem to have been. If you'd care to prove me wrong, I stand ready to be corrected, but I will insist on quotations and/or screenies to back up your argument, since this is an evidentiary issue, not a philosophical issue.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 08, 2005 2:15 am Dave wrote: Human souls do this, but EoE and 23 say nothing on the souls of the Angels.
